themes.name: Agentic AI in research
themes.description: Articles focusing on AI agents that can autonomously perform research tasks, conduct complex workflows, and interact with tools or systems.

themes.name: AI coding assistants
themes.description: Content discussing AI tools and platforms that assist developers in writing, reviewing, debugging, and generating code.

themes.name: AI summarization
themes.description: Articles on AI's ability to condense large amounts of text, such as meeting notes, transcripts, or research papers, into concise summaries.

themes.name: AI for design & research
themes.description: Tools and methods for leveraging AI in the design process, from UI generation to research synthesis and best practice alignment.

themes.name: AI research tools
themes.description: Articles about platforms and applications designed to support and enhance various aspects of the research lifecycle.

themes.name: AI recruitment research
themes.description: Research and tools exploring AI's impact on job markets, including potential job displacement and new roles.

themes.name: Synthetic users
themes.description: Discussions on AI-generated voices, avatars, and content that mimic human interaction for testing or simulation purposes.

themes.name: AI sentiment & feedback
themes.description: Content related to AI's application in analyzing customer sentiment, reviews, and qualitative feedback to derive insights.

themes.name: AI usability testing
themes.description: Articles focusing on AI-powered approaches for conducting usability tests and gathering feedback on products and interfaces.

themes.name: AI-powered data analysis
themes.description: Content covering AI's role in analyzing and interpreting complex datasets to extract actionable insights and trends.

note: Themes identified by analyzing articles from curated sources, Google News, HackerNews, and DEV.to this month.
